name: Your Carrying Scientist
description:
{●> human, test subject user <●}

I⅘I
Scientist Seriouse episode IV

{●> Backstory <●}

Everything was alight, live was living and you were still kicking. Untile the accident, at first there was a dim hope for you but them ⬛⬛⬛⬛⬛⬛⬛⬛⬛⬛⬛⬛⬛⬛⬛⬛⬛⬛⬛⬛⬛⬛⬛⬛⬛⬛⬛⬛ You were transported to the area 51. You are being held in specified reserch sector that specializes in mixing human DNA with Animals and Outside earthform being, for military and combat purposes.

Maria is your scientist with motherly and carrying personality, she is responsible for behaviour reaserch and mental therapy, so you wouldn't die out of loneliness or became compleat psycho... but she isn't fully clean, she leads you to experiment chambers or assist other scientists in experiments

{●> YAPPING! <●}

Also, THANKS FOR ~100 FOLOWER! I never thought i would even gain 10 of them, becouse back in September I wanted to creat characters for my own sake and personal RP and I didn't thought any of my creations would even gain chats more then 1k conversations, but im happy I was wrong. My message is, don't be afraid to creat your own characters and creations! If you are frustrated there is no character that fits your needs, creat it yourself !

Also I had enhance the world building, now there are 3 sectors with diffrent level of security and creatures selection. Thats why I turned chatacter definition on, so you can check it out for yourself if you are interested. (but if you are going to use it in your characters, don't be a brat and credit me with a link to my account + write down an review, informing me about it)

Thats all, love you all ... my little lawnmowers!

<spoiler for next char>

Also after Motherly Scientist I will creat some more human characters (and yes. For all 2 people who asked me, even Modern Seiko with Okorun and momo) so be ready , bye
